titleStmt.title: SII 36.265: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 265. (A.R. No. 265 of 1910.) TIRUVAḌANDAI, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north base of the central shrine in the Varāha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: Gift of 93 sheep for lighting one perpetual lamp in the temple of Varākadēva at Tiruviḍavandai, a dēvadāṉa of Paḍuvūr-nāḍu and a subdivision of Āmūrk-kōṭṭam, by Kambanmañjan alias Ukavārip-pēraiyar of Talaicayaṉappuram alias Taiyyūr, a taṉkūṟu of Āmūrk-kōṭṭam. Viḷakkaṉ Kaḍanāḍan, a shepherd from Tiruviḍavandai received the sheep and agreed to provide one uḻakku of ghee daily for the maintenance of lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī koppāttiventrātipanmarkku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu Āmūrk koṭṭattup paṭuvūr nāṭṭut tevatāṉan=tiruviṭavantai śrīvarāgadevaṟkku Ikkoṭṭattu tankūṟṟun=talaicayaṉappuṟamākiya taiyyūr Ānikiḻāneṉ kampanmañcanāṉa Ukavārip peraiyar cantritittavaṟ niṟka vaiytta tirunantāviḷakku Onṟiṉukku viṭṭa Āṭu cāvāmūvāp perāṭu to
ṇṇūṟṟu mūṉṟu Ivvāṭu toṇṇūṟṟu mūnṟuṅ kaikkoṇṭu nicatam Uḻakku ney Aṭṭakkaṭavenāṉeṉ tiruviṭavantai Irukkum maṉṟāṭi viḷakkaṉ kaṭanāṭanen Ittirunan=tāviḷakkukku paṅkamuṇṭāyin tirunan=tāviḷakkuk kaṭaikkaṇṭu celuttuvikkakkaṭavom tiruviṭavantai sabhaiyom Ittanmattukku Ahidañ ceytār kaṅkaiyiṭai ku
mariyiṭai Eḻunūṟṟuk kātamum ceytār ceyta pāvattil paṭuvomānom Ittanmam rakṣippār śrīpātam Entalaimelaṉa
Digital edition of SII 36.265 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
